title: Fire Force
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (24) + S2 (24) + S3 Part 1 (12) + S3 Part 2 (13). Manga complete at 305 chapters; anime adapted the full run. Virtually no filler. Arc boundaries from Fire Force Wiki / Deltia's arc guide.
